full_text:
Liu Shao еҠүйӮө
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Shao (еҠүйӮө). Sent with Mi Fang to take Qichun and took Jin Zong captive. Liu Shao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
